prefixes.label: ch-
prefixes.notes: Hot-process marker. ch = c (hot quality) + h (process vector). Near-parity with sh- in Balneo section only.

prefixes.label: sh-
prefixes.notes: Cold-process marker. sh = s (cold quality) + h (process vector). sh- takes processual suffixes at 3.8x the rate s- does.

prefixes.label: da-
prefixes.notes: Medicine / essence prefix. Stable across all sections; ratio C/H approximately 1.00.

prefixes.label: ok-
prefixes.notes: Water-locative prefix: o (in) + k (water). Distinct from qok- (dosed water).

prefixes.label: qok-
prefixes.notes: Dosed-water verbal paradigm: qo (dose) + k (water). 51% of tokens end in -y (processual).

prefixes.label: qot-
prefixes.notes: Dosed-oil verbal paradigm: qo (dose) + t (oil). qotch/qotsh ratio ~12:1 (more hot-biased than water).

prefixes.label: ot-
prefixes.notes: Passive / reflexive prefix. Enriched 2.4x in Zodiac (descriptive register). Exclude tokens starting with 'oth'.

prefixes.label: l-
prefixes.notes: Spirit (alcohol) prefix. Enriched 3.37x in Stars section (formulary of tinctures).

prefixes.label: y-
prefixes.notes: Imperative prefix. Enriched ~2x in Cosmo section.

prefixes.label: s-
prefixes.notes: Vinegar prefix. IMPORTANT: must exclude tokens starting with 'sh' to avoid conflating with cold-process marker. s- takes nominal suffixes at 108x the rate it takes processual suffixes.

prefixes.label: t-
prefixes.notes: Oil prefix. Exclude tokens starting with 'th'. qotch/qotsh ~12:1 reflects hot extraction bias for oils.

corpus_notes.standalone_matching: All prefix counts use standalone word-boundary matching on full tokens. Substring matching is never used.
corpus_notes.uncertainty_marker: '!' characters within tokens indicate uncertain readings; strip before analysis.
